text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black once bemoaned her lack of
eye-catching qualities, but now, fans have voted
her as the most popular Umamusume, and she's
ready for the Takarazuka Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her showdown with Brusquement is finally here.
There's no need to imitate another's talent. All
they must do is make the most of their unique
skills.
